/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cross_eyeleop_app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cross_eyeleop_app.dir/cross_eyeleop_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cross_eyeleop_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cross_eyeleop_app.dir/src/infrastructure/settings/QSettingsRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cross_eyeleop_app.dir/src/infrastructure/timing/QtHeartbeat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cross_eyeleop_app.dir/src/presentation/viewmodels/MainViewModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cross_eyeleop_app.dir/src/presentation/windows/MainWindow.cpp.o -o cross_eyeleop_app  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 libcross_eyeleop_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
